text: Solar+BESS tariffs at ₹2.86/unit are now competitive with coal
FY26 RE awards ~19.9 GW; FDRE & Solar+BESS rising in the tender mix
Module overcapacity: ~145 GW capacity vs ~58 GW demand (~2.5×)
Top IPPs target ~186 GW by FY30, from ~76 GW operational today
Peak demand hit a record 256 GW (Apr 2026), ~+5% YoY
PM Surya Ghar at ~30% of its 1-crore-rooftop target; 11.5 GW pipeline
Listed module makers' EBITDA margins span 19–41%; Vikram cheapest at ~14× P/E
